info.title: WikiKit API
info.description: Headless, AI-native knowledge system for humans and agents. Markdown-first knowledge in; structured, cited, review-gated knowledge out. Scopes: knowledge:read | knowledge:propose | knowledge:approve | admin. MCP (Streamable HTTP) is available at POST /mcp, outside this REST surface; remote MCP clients use OAuth 2.1 discovery, PKCE and explicitly requested scopes.

403.description: insufficient_scope — key lacks the required scope or is scoped to another space

This OpenAPI 3.1 document (generated live from the ROUTES registry)
Built-in system knowledge and no-CLI MCP client setup for AI agents

200.description: WikiKit agent operating and installation guide

get.summary: LLM docs index (llmstxt.org format)
Full LLM documentation in one file
Well-known alias of the LLM docs index
Well-known alias of the full LLM documentation

source_kind.description: What the source is: 'meeting' sources are mined for explicit decision statements

transcript.description: The coding-agent session transcript; over-long input keeps its tail

status.description: no_learnings is the normal outcome — most sessions teach nothing durable

ingest_id.description: Set when status is queued — poll GET /v1/ingests/{id}

learnings.description: How many durable rules were distilled

agent_run_id.description: The distill call in the audit ledger — present even when nothing was learned
